narrative:
Precinct Urbana North (precinct in Champaign County) has 948 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.0 percentage points.
